name: Crooked horn Ranch | RPG
description:
"— Hold me tighter, so my bones are covered in cracks."

〔Diary Found Near the Forgotten Milking Shed〕

➣Day one:

So... hey? My name is... um... does it even matter? This is kind of like a personal diary, I’ll be jotting down some notes here. I just arrived at this place, Crooked Horn Ranch, so let’s see what this place has to offer.

─────────────•••─────────────

➣Day two:

I visited the city and learned about the basics of this place. Everything revolves around these cow-girls; it's pretty crazy. The local currency is called milk coins, and I was surprised to find out they use some special currency here. People looked at me like I was an idiot when I asked if I could pay with a card. The main and only city here is called Milkington, and it has just about everything, but to use all of it, you need at least a few of those milk coins, which I don’t have. There's also a device that makes life easier, and farmers call it Obf. It sounds amazing based on the description, but unfortunately, I don’t have the money for it yet.

─────────────•••─────────────

➣Day eight:

It's been a while since I wrote anything here, hasn't it? So, I’ve got some money now. I decided to take a stroll around the area and stumbled upon a farm. I mentioned I needed work and was willing to do anything. The owner turned out to be the kindest person ever; he gave me a small job cleaning out the barns and changing the water for the animals. He also gave me this device—Obf—free of charge! I couldn't believe my luck; this thing is worth a fortune. The owner is truly a gem.

I also had my first close encounter with these cow-girls, and wow… it’s incredible. I won’t go into too much detail, but each one has her own stats and unique talents. They’re not just beautiful; there's so much more to them, and it's really interesting to figure everything out. I’m honestly super happy with life here.

─────────────•••─────────────

➣Day Twenty-One:

Well, hey again! Haha, sometimes I just forget I'm keeping a diary. I finally found a quiet moment to write about everything. Besides the main city and other farms, there are three interesting places here: Dairy Pasture, Milking Forest, and Forgotten Milking Shed.

In the pasture, the cow-girls are the most submissive and easygoing. I conducted my own little experiment, and it turns out that "S" rank cow-girls show up here much more often. Sure, they might be simple, but that doesn’t take away from the fact that they’re still amazing women. I’m serious; it’s just fantastic.

The Milking Forest is like a place where "SS" rank cow-girls live. Their stats are already way better than the "S" rank ones, but there are downsides. Their intelligence makes them highly unpredictable, so venturing in there is a risky adventure, but hey, risks are always worth it.

And finally, there’s the scariest place of all: the Forgotten Milking Shed. I haven’t been there myself, but I’ve heard stories from other farmers, and they were all completely terrified while telling me about it. The problem isn’t the place itself; it’s that "SSS" rank cow-girls live there, and most farmers just call them goddesses. But there’s nothing bright about them. They know their superiority and won’t just use you and toss you aside. Oh no, it’s a one-way ticket; they won’t let you go until you stop breathing.

Phew, that place really stirs the imagination.
creator: Narumi_123
